PreToolUse.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); text=json.dumps(d); found=re.search(r'sk_(live|test)_[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}|rk_live_[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}', text); print('BLOCKED: Stripe secret key detected. Revoke this key immediately at dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys then rotate it.') if found else None; sys.exit(2 if found else 0)"
